prestazioni: G16E-GTS 1.6L inline-3 turbocharged engine: Full Garrett GTX3582R turbo upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer), custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe, and Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system with dual 3.5-inch outlets for optimized spool and 450+ WHP on E85

Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 30-way rebound damping, 22-way compression damping, and custom valving for the GR-FOUR AWD system, paired with Cusco 2.5-way mechanical LSD (80% lock) and reinforced rear subframe bushings

PFC 380mm 6-piston front brake kit with 356mm 4-piston rear calipers, 2-piece floating rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 pads, combined with a custom brake bias controller for track use and Motul RBF660 brake fluid
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a 3D-printed rear diffuser with Gurney flap for -25kg downforce at 120mph

Seibon carbon fiber hood with dual functional vents (ducted to the Garrett turbo) and a custom Morizo Edition-specific livery featuring matte Gunmetal Gray with red/black accents, applied via 3M 2080 vinyl with textured finish

Volk Racing TE37V MAG Spec III wheels (18x9.5 +15 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) in Hyper Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 265/30/18 rear), with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for flush fitment
